Perfect for indoor or outdoor use.
Our Titan Series 60'' Round Plastic Folding Table comfortably sits up to 8 guests and is one of our most popular dining table options.

Beneficial to event venues, banquet halls, schools, conference centers or even your own home collection, our 60'' Round Plastic Folding Table can fit into a multitude of settings and is durable enough to last from to season to season.
The waterproof and stain resistant surface insures that the 2'' thick top will never fade and powder coated locking legs securely fold to make for easy storage and transportation.
